song.title: Jesus Savior Pilot Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, Savior, pilot me Over life’s tempestuous sea; Unknown waves before me roll, Hiding rock and treach’rous shoal; Chart and compass come from Thee; Jesus, Savior, pilot me.
[V2] 2) As a mother stills her child, Thou canst hush the ocean wild; Boist’rous waves obey Thy will When Thou say’st to them, “Be still!” Wondrous Sov’reign of the sea, Jesus, Savior, pilot me.
[V3] 3) When at last I near the shore, And the fearful breakers roar ’Twixt me and the peaceful rest— Then, while leaning on Thy breast, May I hear Thee say to me, “Fear not, I will pilot thee.”
song.author: Edward Hopper
